projects.name: Physiofit Gym Manager
projects.description: Professional gym management suite featuring automated membership expiry tracking, secure financial dashboards, lead generation, schedule/holiday management, and automated transaction communication.
features: 📊 Dashboard & Analytics: Live overview metrics
automated alert lists for memberships expiring in 7 days

and interactive renewal timelines.
👥 Member & Lead Tracking: Multi-criteria profiles
prospective lead queues with one-click active membership conversion

and direct-to-chat WhatsApp link routing.
💳 Billing & Financials: Live unpaid outstanding balance worksheets
historical payment logs
customizable percentage discounts

and cumulative margin reports.
📋 Plan Configuration: Dynamic base tier builders
days-based package durations

and list-based service upsells.
📅 Operational Schedules: Operational times record sheet and official closed-day logs.
📄 Export Reporting: Branded PDF reports (Client Manifests and Billing Registers) with custom headers
footers
page counts
and safety margin spacing.

projects.name: Legal Draft Generator
projects.description: An elite, fast, and secure full-stack courtroom draft automation engine designed specifically for Indian litigation advocates, solicitors, and law firms. From fast-tracked Vakalatnama generation to instant Section 138 Negotiable Instruments Act Complaint-to-Synopsis conversion, our platform automates the cumbersome administrative workflows of Indian District and Sessions Courts, High Courts, and Taluka judiciary benches. Featuring a private, sandboxed, client-side processing core, it ensures complete data confidentiality, offline pincode-to-taluka indexing, and responsive, perfectly formatted A4 printable PDFs with absolutely zero risk of third-party data tracking.
features:
⚖️ 1. Flagship AI-Powered Section 138 Complaint to Synopsis Converter
Takes raw court complaints (PDF
DOCX

or unstructured plain text) and instantly transforms them into perfectly categorized Case Synopses.
Utilizes a secure server-side Gemini API proxy to isolate key legal markers
vital timelines

and party identities.
📍 2. Intelligent Smart Location Field (Indian Post Office & Pincode Integration)
Auto-populates full state
district

and regional taluka levels directly from a 6-digit PIN code query.
Employs an intelligent double-fallback pipeline: querying live postal APIs first
with a seamless switch to an internal

lightning-fast offline database india-pincode-search to ensure zero-latency lookups.
📂 3. Compliant Multi-Document Court Packager (Civil & Criminal Bundles)
Generate an entire legal package simultaneously

containing:
Standardized Vakalatnama (fully compliant with state bar council guidelines)
Registered Address Form (Memo of Addresses)
Process Fee Form (Fard-Talebi)
List of Documents (Index of Exhibits & Annexures)
Form-field inputs are synchronized in real-time
meaning you type once

and every matching field throughout the package updates instantly.
🛡️ 4. Sandbox Privacy Control & Local-First Processing
All legal texts and sensitive client identity headers are processed right inside the sandbox iframe.
Enforces secure local state rendering

meaning that your drafting stay totally private unless you explicitly run advanced deep-text AI analysis via server endpoints.
🖨️ 5. Standardized A4 Court Presentation with OCR Diagnostics
Exports legal layouts in absolute pixel-perfect

double-spaced A4 formats.
Features runtime CSS sanitizers that bypass parsing exceptions (such as OKLCH color-space boundaries in raw canvas parsers) to guarantee flawless print previews under high-density rendering.

projects.name: VendorCalc (Vendor Calculator)
projects.description: it's a app which assist vendor to manage invoices, track revenue & fast calculation related to his or her business

projects.name: UPSC Academia (Coaching Class Website)
projects.description: A specialized web application that integrates with the official university and government exam APIs (like UPSC, MPSC, BARTI). This platform enables students and prospective leads to quickly and reliably check real-time exam schedules, results, and class updates.
features: Real-Time Status: Fetches up-to-date exam schedules
Staff Login Portal
PDF Upload facility for staff
Email Automation
Official API Integration
User-Friendly Interface: Simple navigation for students to access notes
class updates

projects.name: College Inquiry Chatbot
projects.description: A web-based, AI-powered chatbot designed as a final year project to handle student college inquiries. It leverages NLP to provide accurate, context-aware information, significantly streamlining the query resolution process.
features: Intelligent Query Resolution: Uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) to understand context. Targeted Information: Provides specific answers for Brijlal Biyani Science College students. Web-Based Accessibility: Easy access via any standard web browser.

projects.name: LOST & FOUND
projects.description: A user-friendly web dashboard designed to centralize the process of reuniting lost items with their owners within a specific geographic location (e.g., an office space or campus). It allows users to easily post details of lost or found items, streamlining item reporting
features: Allows users to post details and images of lost or found items
Search Functionality: Enables users to search for matching items using keywords and filters
Direct Communication: Facilitates contact between the finder and the owner for item retrieval
Centralized Management: Provides a unified platform for tracking and managing all reported lost and found items.

projects.name: Rail Sarthi PNR Checker
projects.description: A specialized web application that integrates with official Indian Railways APIs via OpenRouter. This tool enables users to quickly and reliably check the real-time reservation status (PNR status) of their railway tickets.
features: Real-Time PNR Status: Fetches up-to-date ticket confirmation details instantly. Official API Integration: Utilizes secure and official railway APIs for accurate data. User-Friendly Interface: Simple input for 10-digit PNR number results in fast retrieval.

projects.name: PDF2Word - Word2PDF
projects.description: A utility web application for seamless document format conversion. It allows users to convert PDF files into editable Word documents and vice versa, providing a quick solution for common file manipulation needs.
features: Bi-Directional Conversion: Supports both PDF to Word and Word to PDF conversions. Efficiency: Offers a fast and simple method for common file format changes. Pure Web Implementation: Runs entirely in the browser without requiring external software.

projects.name: Image Format Converter
projects.description: A versatile web utility designed to convert digital images between various file formats (e.g., JPG to PNG, PNG to JPG). This tool offers a simple interface for essential image manipulation tasks.
features: Multiple Format Support: Converts images across common formats like JPG
PNG
etc. Intuitive User Experience: Designed for simplicity and ease of use. Tailwind CSS Styling: Modern and responsive interface using Tailwind CSS framework.
